rows.title: ATOMIC COMPACT SERIES 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 23ga Pin Nailer (Tool Only)
rows.description: Complete finish, trim, and remodeling work with this ATOMIC COMPACT SERIES 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 23 Ga. Pin Nailer. The battery-powered nailer is designed to drive 23 Ga. pin nails measuring between 5/8 in. and 1-1/2 in. with its high-output brushless motor. Take advantage of cordless convenience as you seamlessly drive nails with no hoses, compressors, or gas cartridges required. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Compatible With Several Sizes Of Fasteners - Unit works with 23 Ga. pin nails from 5/8" up to 1-1/2 in. in length
Designed For Ease Of Use - With tool-free jam release and tool-free depth adjust
Know When To Reload - Low nail lockout system with LED indicator to inform user when it's time to reload
additional_features: Shots Per Charge - DCN623B drives 2,000 nails on average per charge**
includes: (1) DCN623 DEWALT 20V MAX* 23 Ga. Cordless Pin Nailer
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
**1" pins in 2X SPF lumber with DEWALT DCB203 2.0 Ah battery

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 15 GA Cordless Angled Finish Nailer (Tool Only)
rows.description: The DEWALT DCN650 15 Gauge Angled Finish Nailer drives 15 Gauge angled finish nails from 1-1/4" to 2-1/2" which makes it ideal for fastening crown molding, casing, baseboards, and hardwood floor installation. With its brushless motor powered by a DEWALT 20V MAX* Lithium-Ion battery the DCN650 is ready to go to work without the hassle of using gas, compressor, and hose. Tackle jobs both large and small with the features of a pneumatic tool and the freedom of cordless. * - Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: 100% battery powered. Eliminates the hassle of using gas, compressor, and hose
Brushless motor maximizes runtime and durability
Micro nose improves line of sight and accuracy of nail placement (Compared to DEWALT DC628)
additional_features: Tool-free selectable trigger for sequential or contact actuation modes
Tool-free depth adjustment for precise countersinking of nails
Tool-free jam release to quickly and easily clear nail jams
Multi-functional LED lights help to provide both workspace illumination and tool diagnostics
Integrated tool-free stall release lever to quickly reset the driver blade in the event of a stall
Adjustable belt hook for left or right attachment depending on user preference
Inline magazine provides easy use in multiple orientations and in tight spaces
Compatible with all DEWALT 20V MAX* batteries
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 18 Gauge 2 in. Brad Nailer Kit
rows.description: The DEWALT DWP12231 18 Gauge 2 in. Brad Nailer drives 18 Gauge brad nails from 5/8" to 2" which makes it ideal for fastening decorative molding, casing, kitchen crown, and shoe molding. With its long life, maintenance-free motor, the DWFP12231 is ready to go to work.
features: Long life maintenance-free motor to keep from staining the work surface
Sequential style trigger
Tool-free depth-of-drive adjustment with detents for proper setting of nail heads
additional_features: Tool-free jam release mechanism for easy nail removal
Rear exhaust to keep contaminates away from work
Drives 18 gauge nails from 5/8 in. to 2 in. length
Adjustable belt hook allows the tool to be kept near the user
Kit includes: carrying case, and owners manual
Removable non-marring nose tip with on tool storage
Integrated rubber grip for improved comfort

Drives 18 Ga. brad nails from 5/8 in. to 2-1/8 in. length
Long life maintenance-free motor to keep from staining the work surface
additional_features: Tool-free jam release mechanism for easy nail removal

Rear exhaust to keep contaminates away from work

rows.title: 23 GA Pin Nailer
rows.description: Our 23 GA Pin Nailer sets 2 in. nails recessed into oak with the power and adaptability to deliver professional results. This is the ideal tool for contractors, woodworkers, and cabinet builders looking to fasten materials while keeping nail visibility to a minimum. Tool-free jam release and depth adjustment for easy nail removal. Pick up this hard-working pneumatic fastening tool for completing finish and trim jobs.
features: Drives 23 GA 2 in. nails recessed into oak
World"s first 23 GA Pin Nailer with tool-free jam release for easy nail removal
Tool-free depth adjustment for driving recessed fasteners
additional_features: Oil-free operation reduces risk of oil stains on work surface
Low nail lockout with bypass and reload alert
Uses 23 GA headless pin nails from 5/8 in. to 2 in. length
Reversible belt hook for hands-free carrying on the jobsite

rows.title: 15 GA Precision Point "DA" Style Angle Finish Nailer
rows.description: The DEWALT DWFP72155 15 GA PrecisionPoint "DA" Style Angle Finish Nailer drives 15 Gauge DA style nails from 1-1/4 in. to 2-1/2 in. making it ideal for interior trim, baseboards, crown molding and more. With its 16 in. On-center gauge to measure exactly 16 in. from end to nose, and PrecisionPoint technology for precise nail placement, this tool is ready to work.
features: Precision Point Technology - Precise nail placement due to a smaller nose, compared to current DEWALT nailers, and no need to compress the contact trip to actuate the tool
Long-life, maintenance-free motor helps to keep from staining the work surface
Tool-free jam release mechanism for easy nail removal
additional_features: Tool-free depth-of-drive adjustment for proper setting of nail heads
Selectable Trigger - Sequential or contact actuation
Integrated air blower allows to clear away debris from work surface
16 in. on-center gauge flips out to measure exactly 16 in. from end to nose for installing wall trim
